problem_text_cn: 1. 证明光子从星球表面到达无穷远，频移Δf≪f时，Δf/f≈-GM/(Rc²)；2. 太空实验中，飞船监测星球表面He⁺离子发射光子的共振激发，测得β=v/c与d（到星体表面距离）数据，用作图法求星球半径R和质量M；3.（a）静止原子跃迁发射光子，考虑相对论反冲，用能级差ΔE和原子静止质量m₀表示光子能量hf；（b）计算He⁺离子反冲频移比，证明其远小于引力红移。
problem_text_en: 1. Prove that when a photon travels from the star's surface to infinity and the frequency shift Δf≪f，Δf/f≈-GM/(Rc²)；2. In a space experiment, the spacecraft monitors the resonant excitation of photons emitted by He⁺ ions on the star's surface，and measures data of β=v/c and d（distance to the star's surface）. Use the graphing method to find the star's radius R and mass M；3.（a）A stationary atom emits a photon during transition. Considering relativistic recoil，express the photon energy hf in terms of the energy level difference ΔE and the atomic rest mass m₀；（b）Calculate the recoil frequency shift ratio of He⁺ ions and prove that it is much smaller than the gravitational redshift.
problem_solution_cn: （1）引力红移证明：- 光子引力质量m=hf/c²，能量守恒hfᵢ - hfբ=GMmᵢ/R，Δf/f=(fբ - fᵢ)/fᵢ≈-GM/(Rc²)。（2）R和M求解：- 共振条件β=GM/(c²)(1/R - 1/(R+d))，变形为1/β=(Rc²/(GM))(R/d + 1)；- 作1/β - 1/d线性图，截距α=Rc²/(GM)，斜率αR，解得R≈1.10×10⁸ m，M≈5.11×10³⁰ kg。（3）反冲频移：- （a）能量守恒m₀c²=√(p²c² + m₀'²c⁴) + hf，动量守恒p=hf/c，联立得hf=ΔE(1 - ΔE/(2m₀c²))；- （b）He⁺离子ΔE=40.8 eV，m₀c²=3752 MeV，Δf/f≈5.44×10⁻⁹≪10⁻⁵（引力红移）。
problem_solution_en: （1）Proof of gravitational redshift：- The gravitational mass of the photon m=hf/c²，energy conservation hfᵢ - hfբ=GMmᵢ/R，Δf/f=(fբ - fᵢ)/fᵢ≈-GM/(Rc²)。（2）Solution of R and M：- Resonance condition β=GM/(c²)(1/R - 1/(R+d))，transformed to 1/β=(Rc²/(GM))(R/d + 1)；- Plot the linear graph of 1/β - 1/d，intercept α=Rc²/(GM)，slope αR，solving gives R≈1.10×10⁸ m，M≈5.11×10³⁰ kg。（3）Recoil frequency shift：- （a）Energy conservation m₀c²=√(p²c² + m₀'²c⁴) + hf，momentum conservation p=hf/c，combining gives hf=ΔE(1 - ΔE/(2m₀c²))；- （b）For He⁺ ions，ΔE=40.8 eV，m₀c²=3752 MeV，Δf/f≈5.44×10⁻⁹≪10⁻⁵（gravitational redshift）。
problem_answer: ight)$；（b）反冲频移比≈5.44×10⁻⁹，远小于引力红移
